nasa_apod.title: Comet R3 PanSTARRS over a Himalayan Valley
nasa_apod.explanation: The best way to see comet R3 PanSTARRS’s long tail is with a camera. This week, the recently brightened comet appears in northern skies to the east just before dawn, but is only barely visible to the unaided eye. The many-degree ion tail captured on long duration camera exposures is not unusual for ...
